$comment: AgenticROS config template tuned for sim-amr. Drop this in ~/.agenticros/config.json (or run `agenticros init` and answer 'simulation') to point the MCP server + OpenClaw plugin at the sim's topics. All values match agenticros_sim/config/amr_bridge.yaml. NOTE: robot.namespace is intentionally empty - the sim bridge publishes /cmd_vel, /scan, /imu/data, etc. at the graph root (no robot prefix), so AgenticROS must NOT namespace topics. For multi-robot sim, prefix the topics in amr_bridge.yaml and set namespace here to match. For Nav2 demos: `agenticros up sim-amr --nav2` then install @agenticros/navigate-to (or pin skillRefs below).
